**Become a BCBA With ABA Journey — Remote · Flexible · Mission\-Driven**
------------------------------------------------------------------------


Are you a **BCBA** looking for a **remote**, flexible, and meaningful role? At **ABA Journey**, we empower every child on the autism spectrum to reach their highest potential through compassionate, evidence\-based ABA therapy. We’re seeking a dedicated **Board Certified Behavior Analyst (BCBA)** to join our growing team and provide exceptional care to children and families across Georgia.


This **remote BCBA role** offers autonomy, support, and a chance to make a real impact — all while maintaining work\-life balance.

**Position: Board Certified Behavior Analyst (BCBA)**
-----------------------------------------------------

**Location:** Remote — must reside in Georgia, Anderson, SC or within 50 Miles of the Georgia State Border  

**Schedule:** Full\-time or part\-time (flexible)  

**Pay:** $75–90/hour


We welcome experienced **BCBAs*

spy_783fd9cc3ba1.title: Board Certified Behavior Analyst BCBA Telehealth Remote
spy_783fd9cc3ba1.description:
**Join Our Nationwide Telehealth Team at United Care ABA!**

**As Medicaid funding drops, most are stepping back. We're stepping up.**  

**Help us make sure no child is left behind — no matter the zip code or pay rate.**


At United Care ABA, we’re calling on **BCBAs across the country** to help us serve **New York’s most vulnerable families** — children who rely on Medicaid\-funded ABA services.  

With **current and upcoming Medicaid rate cuts**, many companies are walking away. Entire communities are being left without access to care.

**We are doing the opposite.**  

  

We are accepting **every child and family** being told, *“We can’t serve you anymore.”*


If you're a BCBA who believes that **care should never be optional**, and you're open to embracing **a leaner, more purposeful model**, we want to work with you.

**Why United Care ABA?**


We are not business\-as\-usual. Our model is **flexible, ethical, and impact\-first** — designed to sustain care even in the face of fun

spy_be64d5956b0d.title: Applied Work Reviewer - Contract
spy_be64d5956b0d.description:
Company Description

SignalVerified is building structured human judgment systems for AI\-era hiring.

We help employers and education partners evaluate real analytical capability through governed, evidence\-based review of applied work. Our approach is designed to reduce uncertainty in hiring by moving beyond résumés, polished interviews, and self\-reported skills toward demonstrated performance under realistic conditions.

Our core offering, TheSignal™, is a structured applied\-work verification experience designed for analyst and data\-adjacent hiring. Participants complete role\-aligned business challenges that simulate real analytical and decision\-making environments. Submitted work is evaluated through dual independent human review using defined standards focused on relevance, mastery, communication, and collaboration.

When standards are met, participants receive a verified performance summary designed to support real hiring conversations. These summaries help employers better

spy_72abdd86701f.title: GIS Analyst
spy_72abdd86701f.description:
**Job Title:** GIS Analyst

**Work location**: Remote

**Agency**: Office of Personnel Management (OPM) Office of Inspector General (OIG)

**Duration of contract**: 1 year

**Job Responsibilities**

**Data Analysis \& Visualization**

* Perform spatial analysis on healthcare insurance claims data to identify patterns, trends, and anomalies related to fraud, waste, and abuse
* Create maps, charts, and dashboards using ArcGIS Pro, ArcGIS Online, and Web\-GIS applications to visualize claim activities spatially
* Conduct link analysis using graph data to represent relationships between patients, providers, hospitals, and procedures for investigative support
* Support stakeholders in requirements gathering for GIS dashboard and graph visualization applications

**Data Preparation \& Quality**

* Geocode addresses in monthly incoming data and validate spatial accuracy of converted records
* Prepare and quality\-check spatial, graph, and tabular datasets imported from geodatabases, graph dat

spy_2d29e90346a2.description:
**Overview**  
Join our dynamic team as a Data Analyst and become a vital driver of data\-driven decision\-making! In this energetic role, you will harness your analytical expertise to transform complex data into clear insights that empower strategic initiatives. You will work across diverse projects, collaborating with stakeholders to optimize processes, enhance reporting, and support business growth through innovative data solutions. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to develop your skills in a fast\-paced environment where your contributions truly make an impact.

**Responsibilities**

* Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets using tools such as SQL, R, Python, and ETL processes to ensure accuracy and consistency.
* Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports utilizing Tableau, Power BI, Looker, and other visualization platforms to communicate insights effectively.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams in an Agile environment to understand business

spy_4fbc40f094ab.title: Geospacial Analyst
spy_4fbc40f094ab.description:
Geospacial Analyst**The Opportunity:**


Critical decisions are made every single day in our government and military. What if you could use your analytical skills to help them make informed decisions? With all the information available today, it takes a skilled analyst to know how to find and interpret the best data to give their clients the right answers. As a geospatial analyst, you use your specialized regional and functional experience and your attention to detail to develop intelligence products and analytic assessments to give your client the actionable intelligence and context they need. If you have strong analytical skills and a problem\-solving mindset, we have an opportunity to use those skills to support our warfighters, protect our national security, and inform our nation’s leaders.

Space Electromagnetic Spectrum Analyst**The Opportunity:**  

As an expert in defense missions, your unique background inspires you to think bigger, push further, and ask questions others don’t. We need your extensive industry knowledge and advisory skills to solve some of our clients’ most complex problems and find solutions that keep our nation safe.


As a defense mission analyst, you’ll bring your leadership and tactical expertise to work alongside thought leaders in electromagnetic spectrum operations (EMSO) on projects for the client. You’ll use your skills and expertise to research various EMSO capabilities, develop assessment plans, and assess various service and Combatant Command exercises, as well as the various ranges’ ability to simulate an adversary's capabilities.


Join us. The world can’t wait.

* 8\+ years of experience in space\-based capabilities

spy_6951bbb45854.description:
Bio\-Deterrence Analyst**The Opportunity:**


Leverages scientific knowledge to support biological or biochemical research agendas. Applies basic principles, theories, and concepts in support of CWMD objectives. Utilizes foundational biodefense skills to address emerging threats, regional risks, and operational resilience. Works under direct supervision to analyze, assess, and enhance readiness measures for biological deterrence and hazard mitigation frameworks supporting Air Force operations.

**You Have:**

* Experience supporting research in biological or biochemical sciences, including risk assessment and biodefense frameworks
* Knowledge of basic epidemiological and biostatistical principles as they apply to biological or CBRN\-related threats
* Ability to analyze data, generate technical assessments, and contribute to developing practical solutions for emerging biothreats
* Secret clearance
* Bachelor’s degree in Biology or Public Health

spy_3d17731b8127.description:
CBRN Analyst**The Opportunity:**


As someone with strong analytical skills, you ask questions others don’t. You’re eager to apply your knowledge to solve complex problems and make our country safer. Your expertise will help identify and address potential threats, analyze readiness gaps, and deliver actionable insights to enhance national security.


As a CBRN Analyst, you’ll bring your analytical and operational expertise to support CBRN threat prediction, modeling, and mitigation efforts for Air Force operations. You’ll work across multiple teams to predict, monitor, and evaluate CBRN hazards while delivering data\-driven recommendations to improve mission outcomes.


Work with us to conduct assessments and provide real\-time insights that align with U.S. Air Force CWMD policies, operational planning, and risk mitigation strategies.


Further your career while creating mission\-forward solutions that matter.


Join us. The world can’t wait.

spy_386a8476480c.description:
Target Digital Network Analyst, Mid**The Opportunity:**


If you have strong analytic skills and a problem\-solving mindset, we have an opportunity for you to use those skills to support our warfighters, protect our national security, and inform our nation's leaders. As a Target Digital Network Analyst, you’ll use your specialized technical experience to enable actions and intelligence collection by conducting analysis of data gathered from targeted communications and information systems.


As an analyst on our team, you’ll provide expert analytic support against high\-value targets while working alongside your client to tackle complex and challenging problems in target development, social network and metadata analysis, understanding target identifiers across multiple communication modes, and developing strategies to gain additional information. This is a chance to grow your expertise, develop new skills, and share your methodologies with other analysts.


Join us. The world can’t wait

CWMD Intel SME**The Opportunity:**


With increasing global threats and complex security challenges, it takes a skilled Intelligence Analyst to assess, gather, and interpret data that informs leadership and enables decision\-making. The stakes are high for decisions made by our government, military, and intelligence community every day, and we need a talented Intelligence Subject Matter Expert (SME) like you to deliver actionable intelligence and enable decision superiority. Using your specialized expertise in CWMD topics, combined with demonstrated experience working across the Intelligence Community (IC), you will provide insightful analyses and strategic guidance to equip leadership with the context they need to protect national security interests and mitigate emerging threats.

spy_55e40f3dac59.title: CWMD Strategy & Policy Analyst
spy_55e40f3dac59.description:
CWMD Strategy \& Policy Analyst**The Opportunity:**


As someone with advanced analytical skills, your unique perspective inspires you to think critically, evaluate options, and find creative solutions others might overlook. Your insights can help tackle some of the most complex challenges facing our clients and contribute to keeping our nation safe.


As a CWMD Strategy \& Policy Analyst, you’ll bring your analytical, strategic, and operational expertise to support Air Force nuclear and CWMD planning. You’ll use your expertise to evaluate policies, develop procedural frameworks, and provide data\-driven insights that integrate treaty compliance objectives and CWMD strategic readiness goals within the Air Force’s operational priorities.


Work with us to research, analyze, and document readiness gaps while creating effective policy interventions and operational deliverables that enhance CWMD mission alignment and resilience. Further your career while creating mission\-forward solutions

Enterprise Product Business and Pricing Analyst**The Opportunity:**

In this role, you will define and deliver the product pricing and packaging strategy for Booz Allen’s product organization, supporting high‑priority, mission‑centric products and market expansion efforts. You’ll serve as a trusted advisor to product leaders, providing strategic and financial insight that informs product direction and supports the company’s financial goals. Partnering closely with product management, marketing, sales, and finance, you will conduct market research, interpret customer feedback, and validate both quantitative and qualitative metrics to guide pricing decisions.


You will lead the development of pricing and packaging strategies, including research, analysis, conceptual strategy development, and financial, cost, and price modeling, for critical new product initiatives. spy_12bf7fcb6161.title: Senior Product Manager - Identity and Access Management (Chronosphere)
spy_12bf7fcb6161.description:
New York, New York, United States Product Engineering Ref ID: JR\-017594  

**Our Mission**


At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real\-world problems with cutting\-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

**This role is intended to be primarily remote; however, candidates must live within a daily commuting distance of NAS Patuxent River, MD and be available to come on\-site as needed to support mission requirements, meetings, and other program activities. spy_4096c17eac8f.title: Senior Backend Engineer
spy_4096c17eac8f.description:
### **About the Role**


Join a Series A cold\-chain risk\-management platform operating at the intersection of IoT, logistics, and data engineering. As a **Senior Backend Engineer**, you'll be a key individual contributor building the distributed systems that contextualize real\-time shipment data for pharmaceutical and perishable goods logistics. This is a high\-leverage role on a small, focused team — your work ships fast and directly impacts product outcomes for global logistics customers.

### **What You'll Do**

* Design and build backend services powering a logistics orchestration and decision\-intelligence platform
* Own data\-heavy distributed systems that ingest, process, and contextualize IoT monitoring data to quantify shipment risk in real time
* Build predictive systems for on\-time, in\-full (OTIF) delivery and automate exception\-handling workflows
* Develop and maintain ETL pipelines, APIs (REST and/or gRPC), and event\-driven architectures
* Operate services on cloud

spy_848e3f63ab83.title: Principal Software Engineer, Application Software (Remote)
spy_848e3f63ab83.description:
### **About Zipline**



Zipline is the world’s largest and most experienced drone delivery service. We are on a mission to serve all humans equally by ensuring access to food, medicine and essential goods anytime, anywhere. We design, build, and operate the world’s largest autonomous logistics system, delivering critical supplies quickly and reliably. Today, Zipline operates on four continents, makes a delivery somewhere in the world every 30 seconds, and has completed millions of deliveries to date, including blood, vaccines, medical supplies, food, and retail products.



Our customers include the world’s largest and most prominent healthcare systems, governments, retailers, restaurants and global businesses who rely on us to save lives, reduce emissions, increase economic opportunity, and provide delivery from point A to point B as fast as possible. The drone is only 15% of what we’ve built to enable seamless, reliable, global operations.

Applied Materials is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world.
